## 改动说明 / What Changed

简要描述你的改动。Brief description of changes.

## 关联 Issue / Related Issue

Closes #

## 改动类型 / Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug 修复 / Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ 新功能 / New feature
- [ ] 📝 文档 / Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ 重构 / Refactor
- [ ] 🧪 测试 / Tests
- [ ] 🔧 构建/CI / Build/CI

## 测试 / Testing

描述你如何测试了这些改动。How did you test this?

- [ ] `npm test` 通过 / passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` 通过 / passes
- [ ] 手动测试（描述场景）/ Manual test (describe)

## 检查清单 / Checklist

- [ ] 代码遵循项目规范 / Code follows project conventions
- [ ] 自测通过 / Self-reviewed
- [ ] 相关文档已更新 / Docs updated (if needed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md 已更新 / CHANGELOG updated (if needed)
